response.justification: Candidate has 14+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and multiple languages including TypeScript and Node.js. However, the resume shows only recent (since April 2025) exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, falling significantly short of the 8+ years of production AI/GenAI experience required. No demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM optimization, or major cloud AI platforms. Strong engineering foundation but a substantial gap on the core GenAI/cloud requirements for a Staff-level FDE role.
strengths: 14+ years of production software engineering with strong TDD/craftsmanship discipline
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Polyglot full-stack experience including TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed/high-throughput systems
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development; AI exposure appears to be ~1 year
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Limited demonstrated experience on major cloud AI platforms (AWS CDK mentioned, but no GCP/Azure AI or enterprise customer-facing FDE work)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient GenAI/AI production experience vs. 8+ year requirement
Missing RAG and vector database expertise
Strong senior-level engineering fundamentals and TypeScript depth
